title: China Beach Trailhead
description: Eastern terminus of the JDF trail. Features a large parking lot, pit toilets, and paved access down to the beach.

title: Sombrio Beach Access
description: Popular access point halfway along the trail. Famous for suspension bridge and hidden waterfall canyon.

title: Botanical Beach Trailhead
description: Western terminus near Port Renfrew. Known for intertidal tidepools and rich marine life.
